content: Pioneerism involves building structures using wood and ropes. Key lashings (amarras) include: 1. Amarra Quadrada (Square Lashing) for 90-degree angles. 2. Amarra Diagonal (Diagonal Lashing) for cross-bracing. 3. Amarra de Tripé (Tripod Lashing) for washstands and towers. Safety requires secure knots (Clove Hitch/Volta do Fiel) and checking stability.
